title: Kay Mann
compiled_truth: Kay Mann is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-06-13), Kay Mann sent 9331 and received 3043 emails, totalling 12374 interactions. Top correspondents: [Suzanne Adams](people/suzanne-adams) (943), [Ben Jacoby](people/ben-jacoby) (814), [Nmann](people/nmann-erac) (629), [Kathleen Carnahan](people/kathleen-carnahan) (613), [Sheila Tweed](people/sheila-tweed) (593). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, bankrupt, calendar, deleted_items, ema_s, florida.
